[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 11001110 5
1 01011110 5
2 10100100 3
3 00101100 3
4 10100110 4
5 00001110 3
6 00110001 3
7 00100110 3

70 07 00111111 6
